name: Peanut Butter and Banana Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F.
Prepare a baking sheet with cooking spray. In a mixing bowl, combine margarine, bananas, egg white, and vanilla. In another mixing bowl, combine flour, sugars, and baking soda. Mix wet ingredients with dry ingredients just until moistened. Drop by tablespoons 2 inches apart onto prepared baking sheet. Bake for about 12 minutes or until lightly browned.
